CONTENT.Honours: ThunSwiss Cup runner-up: 2018–19Young BoysSwiss Super League: 2019–20Swiss Cup: 2019–20
CONTENT.Club career: On 12 January 2022, Spielmann signed with Lausanne-Sport. On 9 September 2023, Spielmann's contract with Lausanne-Sport was terminated by mutual consent.On 2 February 2024, Spielmann returned to Baden until the end of the 2023–24 season.
CONTENT.Personal life: Spielmann was born in Switzerland to a Swiss father and a Congolese mother.

SUMMARY: Marvin Spielmann (born 23 February 1996) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Baden.
